title: Proclamation No. 663, s. 1960
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 663

RESERVING FOR WATERSHED PURPOSES OF THE AMLAN FALLS HYDROELECTRIC PLANT PROJECT OF THE NATIONAL POWER CORPORATION, A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED PARTLY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JOSE AND PARTLY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIBULAN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL NEGROS, ISLAND OF NEGROS

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and National Resources, and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, Carlos P. Garcia, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for watershed purposes of the Amlan Falls Hydroelectric Plan Project of the National Power Corporation under its administration, subject to private rights, if any there be, and to future survey, a certain parcel of land situated partly in the municipality of San Jose and partly in the municipality of Sibulan, province of Oriental Negros, Island of Negros, and more particularly described as follows:

A parcel of land (designated as the Amlan River Forest Reserve in the accompanying NPC Plan) beginning at point marked 1 on the plan being S. 25-53 E, 30,292 meters from NPC L-17 which is S. 33-02 W, 2,651.28 meters more or less from B.L.L.M. 25 shown within the boundary and Index Map of Ayuquitan Cadastre, BL Case No. 3, situated in the municipality of Amlan, (formerly Ayuquitan), now San Jose and Sibulan, thence S. 75° 06′ E., 2,22.0.08 meters to point 2; thence S. 3° 38′ W., 1,361.76 meters to point 8; thence S. 28° 00′ E., 100.00 meters to point 4; thence S. 79° 46′ E., 414.00 meters to point 5; thence S. 16° 11′ E., 1,882.76 meters to point 6; thence S. 43° 50′ W., 1,501.26 meters to point 7; thence S. 89° 47′ W., 552.57 meters to point 8; thence N. 87° 23′ W., 2,770.50 meters to point 9; thence N. 40° 54′ W., 1,718.35 meters to point 10; thence N. 25° 58′ W., 829.57 meters to point 11; thence N. 1° 11′ E., 1,640.12 meters to point 12; thence N. 81° 58′ E., 1,056.89 meters to point 13; thence N. 59° 19′ E-, 2,011.25 meters to point 1; the point of beginning; containing an area of 21,773,150 square meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan.”

(Note: For purposes of clarification, the following lots which were declared as private properties by the Court on August 30, 1949, are hereby excluded from the operation of this proclamation: Lot 4915 of Lucia Ibesate, Lots 4916 and 5143 of Roberto Bilimac, Lot 4918 of Tranquilino and Margarita Bulfa, and Lot 5213 of Fortunata Quini, Ayuquitan Cadastre.)

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 8th day of April, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty, and of the Independence of the Philippines, the fourteenth.

CARLOS P. GARCIA President of the Philippines

By the President: NATALIO P. CASTILLO Executive Secretary

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
